message:
fix(escape-parser): gate std-dependent test behind feature flag (wa-1qo7t)

Test compute_shape_hash_same_for_equal_links uses
std::collections::hash_map::DefaultHasher which is unavailable
in no_std builds. Gate behind #[cfg(feature = "std")].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
